scripts.build:wasm: cd emscripten && ( [ -f build/deps/openblas-wasm/libopenblas.a ] || [ -f build/deps/clapack-wasm/lib/liblapack.a ] || bash build-clapack-wasm.sh ) && emcmake cmake -B build && cmake --build build && cmake -E make_directory ../dist && cmake -E copy build/moonlab.js ../dist/moonlab.js && cmake -E copy build/moonlab.wasm ../dist/moonlab.wasm
scripts.webgpu:eval: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && node scripts/webgpu-eval.mjs
scripts.webgpu:eval:deno: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && deno run -A --unstable-bare-node-builtins scripts/webgpu-eval.mjs
scripts.webgpu:unified:eval: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && node scripts/webgpu-unified-eval.mjs
scripts.webgpu:unified:eval:deno: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && deno run -A --unstable-bare-node-builtins scripts/webgpu-unified-eval.mjs
scripts.webgpu:unified:eval:deno:native: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && MOONLAB_WEBGPU_ENABLE_DENO_NATIVE=1 MOONLAB_WEBGPU_UNIFIED_EVAL_REQUIRE_BACKEND=1 MOONLAB_WEBGPU_UNIFIED_EVAL_REQUIRE_NATIVE=1 deno run -A --unstable-bare-node-builtins scripts/webgpu-unified-eval.mjs
scripts.webgpu:smoke: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && node scripts/webgpu-unified-smoke.mjs
scripts.webgpu:smoke:deno: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && deno run -A --unstable-bare-node-builtins scripts/webgpu-unified-smoke.mjs
scripts.webgpu:smoke:deno:native: pnpm build && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.js dist/moonlab.js && cp emscripten/build/moonlab.wasm dist/moonlab.wasm && MOONLAB_WEBGPU_ENABLE_DENO_NATIVE=1 MOONLAB_WEBGPU_SMOKE_REQUIRE_BACKEND=1 MOONLAB_WEBGPU_SMOKE_REQUIRE_NATIVE=1 deno run -A --unstable-bare-node-builtins scripts/webgpu-unified-smoke.mjs
